title: High Cabinet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''High Cabinet''' was the executive branch of the [[Five Worlds]] after the assassination of [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. Led by the [[Five World Prime Minister]] and the [[President of Five Worlds]], the [[Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Minister of Intelligence]], and [[Minister of Defense (Five Worlds)|Minister of Defense]] were also involved. President [[Dur Gejjen]], along with Ministers [[Gavele Lemora]] and [[Rorf Willems]] plotted the assassination of [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]] of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
